# Upscale Engine Bundle

This directory owns the project-level script bundle for UpscaleEngine.

Layout:

- realesrgan/ — current backend launcher and adapter files
- realbasicvsr/ — reserved for future backend integration
- seedvr2/ — reserved for future backend integration

Unlike third_party/PanoWan, this bundle is maintained inside the repository so the engine-level layout stays aligned with UpscaleEngine rather than any single upstream project name.
